sandbox_method_policy: Use shell and python3 -S for stdlib-only filesystem/archive work; avoid normal python startup for the wrong issues.
steps: Verify H0B2C source ZIP and sidecar.
Inventory existing governance files in boot-critical directories.
Create BOOT_REQUIRED_GATES_v1 as single manifest of required gates and critical governance files.
Patch boot_runtime_executor_v1.py to invoke loader and scatter validator.
Create fixtures and tests for valid boot, missing required path, and unregistered governance scatter.
Run tests from a targeted fresh extract.
Verify ZIP integrity, duplicate count, required files, behavior tests, sidecar.
